title: TC1-should pre-select the default-marked option on the dashboard (single-select)
verifies: checking the Default checkbox on one custom option causes that option's label to be pre-selected in the dashboard variable dropdown after save

title: TC2-should pre-select multiple default-marked options on the dashboard (multi-select)
verifies: multiple Default checkboxes in multi-select mode all become pre-selected values on the dashboard, and unselected options are not included

title: TC3-should block save with validation error when no default option is checked
verifies: save is blocked with 'Select at least one default option' Quasar notification when every custom option has its Default checkbox unchecked

title: TC4-should auto-select first option as default when multi-select is toggled off
verifies: turning multi-select off clears all existing selected flags and auto-selects option[0] as the default, and the Select All checkbox disappears

title: TC5-should update the pre-selected option on dashboard after editing the default
verifies: editing an existing custom variable and swapping which option is the default updates the dashboard's pre-selected value and the old default is no longer shown

title: TC6-should mark all options as default when Select All checkbox is clicked
verifies: clicking the Select All checkbox in multi-select mode checks every individual option's Default checkbox, and after save the dashboard shows all options as pre-selected

title: TC7-should preserve the default option after dashboard reload
verifies: a custom variable's saved per-option default survives closing and reopening the dashboard and still shows the correct default value

title: TC8-should block save after removing the sole default-checked option
verifies: removing the only option marked as default and immediately attempting to save triggers the 'Select at least one default option' validation error
